title_menu_entries.notes: Add the button beside the stock title-menu buttons and route it into the same page-transition flow used for other menu pages.

basecamp_menu_entries.notes: Point MenuClass at the custom widget and place or duplicate the interactive in basecamp so the class roster is reachable in-world.

runtime_checks.expected_result: Your new row name appears once bIsActive is true and the staged DT_PlayerClasses override is mounted.
Selecting the new menu entry ends with the chosen row name being stored as the current class.
